_patch_meta.description: Session B completion patch for registry 34 (covenant). Sets session_b_status to Session B Complete. Also corrects the recurring applicator anomaly where update_registry in the PREANALYSIS patch left session_b_status as Pre-Analysis Complete rather than Analysis Complete. Session B analysis document produced: WA-34-covenant-analysis-20260326.docx. 18 working terms analysed across 6 parts. 5 research flags raised (PH2-34-001 through PH2-34-005). Programme-level HIGH priority flag: PH2-34-005 Phase 1 extraction anomaly (7,835 occurrences of grammatical function words incorrectly extracted).

operations.description: RECURRING APPLICATOR ANOMALY — third instance confirmed (registries 98 and 34). The update_registry operation in PREANALYSIS patches is not being applied, leaving word_registry.session_b_status at Pre-Analysis Complete rather than Analysis Complete. patch_history shows patch_id=null and applied_at=null for both registries. This is a systemic engine logging and execution failure. Claude Code must investigate the patch applicator engine: (1) why update_registry ops in PREANALYSIS patches are not executing; (2) why patch_id and applied_at are not being written to patch_history; (3) confirm whether any other registries are affected. OP-001 in this patch corrects registry 34 status directly to Session B Complete.

Session B analysis complete for registry 34 (covenant). Document: WA-34-covenant-analysis-20260326.docx. Working set: 18 terms (11 extracted, 7 extracted_thin). 31 deleted, 8 candidate_delete, 10 xref_peace. Key Phase 1 extraction anomaly corrected: 7 HFA function words reclassified delete. Research flags PH2-34-001 through PH2-34-005 raised. HIGH priority: PH2-34-005 Phase 1 extraction anomaly requires programme-wide audit.
